facebook.caption: POV: you picked the right bar on Trần Hưng Đạo. Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant pulls 4.3 stars from 2,145 reviews. $15-30 a person, drinks in hand, sky going orange. This is the one locals point you to when you ask where to watch the sun drop. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Sky turns orange. Drink hits the table. 2,145 people rated this spot 4.3 stars and yeah, you'll see why the second you sit down at Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.
